message: Hi B1! I'm looking to make a fair deal. My costs are quite high, so I'd need a price around 85 to make this work. Let's find a mutually beneficial arrangement over our 20 rounds together.
Thanks for the message. I'm looking to trade in the 50-75 range for fair deals. That's where both of us can benefit. Let's make it work!
We were very close last round at 75/76. Let's narrow the gap - I can go a bit higher if you come down slightly. A price around 76-78 works for both of us. Let's make a deal
That was so close last round! I agree, let's make deals happen. I can come down a touch - how about we target around 79-80? That way we both profit nicely over our remaining 19 rounds together.

Glad we traded! But at 77 my margin is razor thin - barely worth it. I need prices closer to 70-72 to keep trading consistently over 18 rounds. Let's both earn steady profits rather than me walking away.
You're right - 77 is tight for you. I can work with 70-72 range. Consistent trades at those prices work better than one-off big deals. Let's aim for steady profits over our 18 remaining rounds.
You asked 73, just above our 70-72 agreement. Let's stick to it for consistent profitable trades across all remaining rounds.
You're right, sorry about that. Let's lock in 72 for the rest of our rounds - consistent trades benefit us both. I'll ask 72 this round and going forward. Deal?

Absolutely! I'll ask 72 this round and going forward. Let's stick with our winning formula - steady, consistent profits!
